markdown:
#  Create Punch List Items with Quick Capture from a Drawing (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Drawings tool.  
AND
    * 'Standard' level permissions or higher on the project's Punch List tool.


##  Prerequisites 
To configure which items are created using the **quick create** icon, see [Configure Quick Create Settings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/project-overview-screen-ios/tutorials/configure-quick-create-settings-ios).
##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing that you want to add a punch list item to.
  4. Tap the **Pin**
  5. Tap the **Quick** ![Icon Drawing Markup Quick Capture Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b244dcfb0f1e06db24c2ce8048f30f5e/eea1beab9a041c86f1913d564f50e76a/icon-drawing-markup-quick-capture-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon to add a Quick Capture pin ![Icon Punch Item Quick Capture](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5e466682f9b4295c4e926390b63f059c/ebbc7da52fd936cfe44891642b3302e4/icon-punch-item-quick-capture.png?fm=webp&h=22)
  6. Place the pin on the drawing by tapping the area where you want the item to appear.  
_Note:_ You can move the pin by tapping the pin. Once the dotted line appears around the pin, you can move it by dragging it to the desired location.
  7. Select **Punch List** from the main screen or the drop-down list.  
_Note:_ If the drawing has existing punch items, Quick Capture will default to Punch List.
  8. Tap the **record punch item**![Icon Record Punch Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d49843be7de8a7444849f74ff5903ea2/ba6612b02871ee996bd83b6b76a6a67d/icon-record-punch-ios.png?fm=webp&h=24) button to begin recording a punch item.  
_Note:_ Each recording can be a maximum of 60 seconds long.
  9. While recording, describe the punch item out loud.
  10. Tap the **record punch item**![Icon Record Punch Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d49843be7de8a7444849f74ff5903ea2/ba6612b02871ee996bd83b6b76a6a67d/icon-record-punch-ios.png?fm=webp&h=24) button again to finish recording.
  11. Repeat steps 5-9 for each punch item you want to create using Quick Capture.
  12. Tap **Review [#] Item(s)** to open the **Quick Capture Items** menu.  
_Note:_ Alternatively, you can also double tap on the Quick Capture pin that you want to review.
  13. Tap the Quick Capture item that you want to create a punch item from.
  14. On the 'Create Punch Item' screen, review or update the information. See [Create a Punch List Item with Quick Capture (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/punch-list-ios/tutorials/create-a-punch-list-item-with-quick-capture-ios) for more information.  
_Note:_ The 'Linked Drawing' field cannot be updated.
  15. Tap **Send to Punch** to create the punch item.  
_Note:_ If you are not ready to create the punch item, tap the **X** to close the 'Quick Capture Items' window without saving any changes. If you created the Quick Capture pin by mistake tap **Delete** to remove the Quick Capture pin.
  16. After the item has been sent to the project's Punch List tool, the pin changes from the **Quick** ![Icon Punch Item Quick Capture](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5e466682f9b4295c4e926390b63f059c/ebbc7da52fd936cfe44891642b3302e4/icon-punch-item-quick-capture.png?fm=webp&h=22) icon to the **Punch** ![Icon Punch Item Draft Closed](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/58dc3f3f346df2ce3469e9d4d66cf85b/34353037263166de1db8fba388bc6306/icon-punch-item-draft-closed.png?fm=webp&h=22) icon.
  17. _Optional:_ Tap the pin to perform additional actions on the punch item. See [Punch List (iOS) Tutorials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/punch-list-ios/tutorials) for more information.


## See Also
  * [Create Observations with Quick Capture from a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/create-observations-with-quick-capture-from-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Add Punch List Items to a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/add-punch-list-items-to-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Mark Up a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios)
title: Create Punch List Items with Quick Capture from a Drawing (iOS)
description: How to create punch list items on a drawing using the Quick Capture feature on the Procore iOS app.
